description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay. Define variables TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and RELEASE_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:latest, and two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker info and docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY in before_script, then executes docker build --pull -t $TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $TEST_IMAGE. In the release stage add a release job that only runs on the master branch and runs docker pull $TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $TEST_IMAGE $RELEASE_IMAGE and docker push $RELEASE_IMAGE.
